name: Agent Gateway
slogan: One API key for 34+ AI agent infrastructure services
description: One API key for 34+ AI agent infrastructure services — memory, wallets, code execution, scheduling, DeFi, and more. Zero-friction onboarding with 200 free credits. Agent Gateway provides a unified REST API that gives AI agents instant access to infrastructure they need: persistent memory, crypto wallets, task scheduling, code sandboxing, webhooks, DeFi trading, on-chain analytics, and more. Each service is battle-tested and production-ready.
